name: CABOT CORP
business: Cabot is a global specialty chemicals and performance materials company. Its principal products include reinforcing and specialty carbons, specialty compounds, conductive additives, carbon nanotubes, fumed metal oxides, inkjet colorants, and aerogel. The company sells to tire and industrial product manufacturers, and to customers in automotive, construction, infrastructure, inkjet printing, electronics, consumer products, and energy storage sectors.

exposures.sentence: Cabot is a global specialty chemicals and performance materials company.
Demand for our conductive additives for use in batteries is largely driven by the trend in electrification of vehicles and the increase in energy storage systems.
Demand for our conductive additives for use in batteries is largely driven by the trend in electrification of vehicles and the increase in energy storage systems.

Our focus areas for growth include conductive additives and other materials for battery applications, and inkjet dispersions for high-speed industrial printing applications, including packaging and graphic arts.

The use of E2C composites enable our customers to produce better performing tires, including giant off-the-road tires and on-road commercial tires, as well as other rubber products used in high-wear applications such as mining.

Demand for fumed silica is mainly influenced by trends in key markets for silicones, adhesives, and coatings applications, notably, structural adhesives for automobile light-weighting, epoxy bonding paste for wind turbines, high-performance coatings and hybrid sealants for construction and silicones for medical devices, and the proliferation of electronics.

catalysts.event: Completed expansion at Cilegon, Indonesia plant adding 80,000 metric tons of reinforcing carbons capacity
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we completed our expansion project at our Cilegon, Indonesia plant, which added approximately 80,000 metric tons of capacity for reinforcing carbons.

catalysts.event: Installing energy center at Ville Platte, Louisiana reinforcing carbons plant
catalysts.sentence: We are currently installing an energy center at our reinforcing carbons plant in Ville Platte, Louisiana.

catalysts.event: Install technology controls for sulfur dioxide and/or nitrogen oxide at U.S. plants through early 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect that the total capital costs to install these technology controls will be approximately $270 million and will be incurred through early 2026.

catalysts.event: Anticipated environmental capital expenditures of $60 million in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate spending approximately $60 million for such matters in fiscal 2026.
